highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 1.68.1 ships the long-running 1.68.1 line as stable with a broad wave of API, view and HarfBuzz work.
highlights_body: This is a large servicing release built from six release candidates over four months. It expands the managed API with Span-based buffers, an SKPictureShader binding and new SKTypeface members, reworks the managed/native type layer for stability, splits the desktop view packages, and refreshes HarfBuzzSharp to 2.6.1.

bullets.lead: Span-based data, bitmap and text APIs
bullets.detail: Adds Span<T> overloads for data buffers, bitmap pixels and text blobs so callers can hand SkiaSharp existing memory without copying through byte arrays.
Binds SkPictureShader for tiling and transforming recorded pictures, adds SKTypeface.IsFixedPitch, and lands int-unicode overloads for consistency across the text APIs.
Reworks how managed wrappers own and reference native objects so shared instances such as colour spaces stop being disposed out from under callers.

bullets.lead: HarfBuzzSharp font funcs and table loading
bullets.detail: Adds font-funcs bindings on the HarfBuzzSharp side and lets faces be loaded directly from table data, alongside general HarfBuzz binding polish.

bullets.lead: iOS canvas and raster view corrections
bullets.detail: Fixes the iOS canvas implementation and stops raster views allocating zero-byte buffers when the surface has no size yet.
Frees native memory when a view is detached, plugs an SKRoundRect leak, and improves UWP GPU view stability under teardown.

bullets.lead: Desktop view packages split; WPF Forms backend added
bullets.detail: Splits the desktop view projects and NuGet packages so consumers can pull only the framework they need, and adds a WPF backend for Xamarin.Forms.

bullets.lead: watchOS and tvOS bitcode, arm64_32 for watchOS
bullets.detail: Enables bitcode for watchOS and tvOS and adds the watchOS arm64_32 slice so SkiaSharp keeps working on modern Apple wearables.
Lets SkiaSharp be built without fontconfig for stripped-down Linux containers and images that do not ship the library.

contributor_summaries.Gillibald: HarfBuzzSharp 2.6.1 bump, HarfBuzz font funcs, int-unicode overloads, and additional HarfBuzz updates
contributor_summaries.danien: Contributed a fix landing in this release
contributor_summaries.newky2k: Contributed a fix landing in this release
contributor_summaries.Odirb: Fixed ToSKPixmap display artifacts with transparent bitmaps (#849)

preview_summaries.rc172: Release Candidate 172 was the final RC before stable, folding in the last UWP GPU view stability fixes and colour corrections.
preview_summaries.rc170: Release Candidate 170 added the SKTypeface.IsFixedPitch binding and prepared for the stable cut.
preview_summaries.rc169: Release Candidate 169 landed the SKRoundRect leak fix and view teardown corrections.
preview_summaries.rc165: Release Candidate 165 brought in the SKPictureShader binding and further HarfBuzz updates.
preview_summaries.rc153: Release Candidate 153 shipped the managed/native type rework and bitcode support for watchOS/tvOS.
preview_summaries.rc147: Release Candidate 147 opened the 1.68.1 line with the Span<T> APIs, the desktop package split, and the WPF Xamarin.Forms backend.
